prompt: - `$scope` must reflect the affected files. Available scopes: [skills/<$name>], [others].
- Write one concise subject line in imperative mood and active voice (e.g. “Add…”, “Fix…”, “Refactor…”).
- Summarize the primary change, not every minor detail.
- Keep the subject line brief (ideally 72 characters or less).
- Avoid ending the subject line with a period.
